description: Comprehensive Loki volume and throughput analytics. Monitor log lines ingested, bytes received, bytes stored, stream counts, compactor throughput, chunk sizes, and growth trends by namespace, tenant, and cluster.

panels.description: Total log lines being ingested per second across all Loki distributors.
panels.title: Lines Ingested/sec

panels.description: Total bytes being ingested per second across all Loki distributors.
panels.title: Bytes Ingested/sec

panels.description: Total active log streams currently held in memory across all ingesters.
panels.title: Active Streams

panels.description: Total chunks currently held in ingester memory awaiting flush.
panels.title: Chunks in Memory

panels.description: Rate of chunk bytes being flushed from ingesters to long-term storage.
panels.title: Chunk Flush Rate

panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across all Loki components.
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of log lines ingested per second, broken down by namespace. Helps identify which namespaces are the heaviest log producers.
panels.title: Lines Ingested Over Time — by Namespace

panels.description: Rate of bytes ingested per second, broken down by namespace. Useful for identifying the largest byte-volume producers.
panels.title: Bytes Ingested Over Time — by Namespace

panels.description: Log line ingestion rate broken down by tenant. Identifies which tenants are generating the most log traffic.
panels.title: Lines/sec by Tenant

panels.description: Bytes ingestion rate broken down by tenant. Identifies which tenants are consuming the most ingestion bandwidth.
panels.title: Bytes/sec by Tenant

panels.description: Top 15 namespaces ranked by bytes ingested per second. Quickly spot the heaviest byte-volume producers.
panels.title: Top 15 Namespaces by Bytes/sec

panels.description: Top 15 tenants ranked by log lines ingested per second. Quickly spot the heaviest line-volume producers.
panels.title: Top 15 Tenants by Lines/sec

panels.description: Bytes ingested per second broken down by cluster. Shows ingestion distribution across your Loki fleet.
panels.title: Bytes/sec by Cluster

panels.description: Log lines ingested per second broken down by cluster. Shows line volume distribution across your Loki fleet.
panels.title: Lines/sec by Cluster

panels.description: Active streams per namespace currently held in ingester memory. A high stream count may indicate label cardinality issues.
panels.title: Active Streams by Namespace

panels.description: Comparison of stream creation rate versus stream removal rate. A growing gap indicates stream churn or accumulation.
panels.title: Stream Creation vs Removal Rate

panels.description: Rate of chunk bytes being flushed from ingesters to long-term storage. Sustained high values indicate heavy write throughput to the object store.
panels.title: Chunk Bytes Flushed/sec

panels.description: Rate of completed compactor runs. Shows how actively the compactor is consolidating chunks in long-term storage.
panels.title: Compactor Throughput

panels.description: Compare current bytes ingestion rate against the same metric 7 days ago. The dashed line represents historical volume for trend analysis.
panels.title: Bytes Volume — Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Compare current lines ingestion rate against the same metric 7 days ago. The dashed line represents historical volume for trend analysis.
panels.title: Lines Volume — Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Correlation between ingestion byte volume (left axis) and P95 write latency (right axis). Rising latency with rising volume may indicate capacity limits.
panels.title: Volume vs Write Latency

panels.description: Percentage of discarded samples versus total ingested. A rising ratio indicates rate-limiting, per-tenant limits, or validation errors are dropping significant log volume.
panels.title: Discarded vs Ingested Ratio

title: Loki — Volume & Throughput Analytics
